Alteran portable AI user bundle

Entry files:
- AGENTS.md
- README.md

Agent profiles:
- agents/alteran-expert.md

Rules:
- rules/core-rules.md

Skills:
- skills/bootstrap-and-entry.md
- skills/apps-tools-and-libs.md
- skills/managed-execution-and-logging.md

Key user-facing rules:
- Use setup for bootstrap and repair.
- Use activate only to enter an already prepared local environment.
- On Unix, activate is sourced.
- Plain Deno stays plain unless Alteran is the explicit route.
- .runtime/ is recoverable local project state.
- Do not revive init as the live bootstrap command.
